description: CompositionDark blue hooded jacket made of 80% cotton and 20% polyester, has long raglan sleeves with ribbed cuffs, hood with lace drawstring, lime green inner panel, zippered closure on the front, two insert pockets on the sides, brand name embroidered on the upper left chest and iconinc three stripe panels from the shoulder to sleeve cuffsFittingRegularWash careWash in water below 40 degreesWash dark colours separatelyDo not soak, tumble dry, bleach or dry cleanDry in shadeWarm ironDo not iron on prints/trims/logoUpdate your casual style with this dark grey hooded jacket from adidas. The simple design exudes strong brand appeal with the iconic three stripes on the sleeves and the embroidered brand name on the upper left chest, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this jacket with jeans, tees and sneakers for a funky look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in jacketsHeight-6.2', Shoulders-16"
